name: Newl Teamship
description: Runs tenant-scoped, read-only Teamship lookups through Newl Apps using the authenticated Teams sender identity.

tenantId.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the configured Teams channel.

readTokenEnv.description: Environment variable containing the Newl Apps Teamship read token.

vercelProtectionBypassEnv.description: Optional environment variable containing a Vercel Preview automation bypass secret.
